title: Scented Candle Fresh Linen 200g - Soy Wax Candle - Home Scented Candle - Aromatherapy - Pure and Fresh Scent - Air Freshener - Candle Gift - Idea for Christmas - Birthday
seller_info_text: AROMATIKA trust the power of nature
features: Home scented candle collection of TM Aromatika is a wonderful world of luxury and delicate fragrances for every space and every moment
This soy wax candle with the Fresh Linen scent fills the room with a fresh aroma and gentle light and creates a good atmosphere for relaxation
The aroma of Fresh Linen is an aroma of cleanliness and freshness that will refresh any space and purify the air from unpleasant odors creating a peaceful environment for pleasant moments
The stylish and elegant design of the Scented Candle with Fresh Linen aroma will be a good addition to any interior and will decorate any room
Scented Candle Fresh Linen is packaged in a stylish box. Its a good idea for present for Birthday, Christmas, Mother's day for your dear people
description: Product Description Scented Candle Fresh Linen Weight: 200g Application: for aromatherapy A scented candle is a modern accessory to decorate any space. The stylish design will complement any interior and add sophistication and luxury to any space. A scented candle with Fresh Linen aroma will fill every corner of the room with a pleasant, refreshing aroma. The candle burns evenly, creating a soft and gentle glow that envelops you in relaxation and peace. The scent intensifies as the wax melts, releasing a fresh scent. Scented Candle Fresh Linen with scent of freshly washed linen will suitable for everyone. Stylish packaging and elegant glass design give the candle a touch of sophistication, making it a stylish accessory and a good gift for any occasion. Directions for use: Remove all packaging before lighting candle. Remove cover. Light the candle. Warning. Burn within sight. Never burn on, or near anything that can catch fire. Keep candles out of the reach of children and pets. Burn away from drafts. Never touch or move a burning candle. Do not use water to extinguish a candle.
